postStartCommand: sleep 15 && docker start elasticsearch || docker run -d --name elasticsearch -p 9200:9200 -e discovery.type=single-node -e xpack.security.enabled=false -e ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m -v elasticsearch_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.13.0
